title: Fix entity observation, dashboard, block query, and multi-step moves
description:
Address 4 issues from live testing:
1. Entity observation only reports hostiles - change to all mobs with hostility flag
2. Dashboard doesn't show nearby entities - add entity list to AgentStatusUpdate and render it
3. Agent doesn't know block below feet - add blockBelow to status updates
4. Multi-step nextSteps for navigate intent - parse relative move commands and execute sequentially
